title: Will Our Heroes Be Able to Find Their Friend Who Has Mysteriously Disappeared in Africa?
writer: Agenore Incrocci, Furio Scarpelli, Ettore Scola
actors: Alberto Sordi, Bernard Blier, Alfredo Marchetti
plot: A pompous, adventure-seeking businessman journeys through Africa with a clumsy employee to find his own disappeared brother-in-law.
